articles.title: Ford is giving its commercial fleet business an AI makeover
articles.summary: Ford announced a new AI-powered service for its commercial fleet and telematics software customers called Ford Pro AI. The generative AI system analyzes data generated by commercial vehicles - including vehicle speed, seat belt activity, and engine health - and converts it into actionable items for fleet managers. The new system manifests as - what […]

articles.title: Meta urged to boost oversight of fake AI videos
articles.summary: Meta's advisers say its methods for policing AI videos are inadequate, especially at times of crisis.

articles.title: How to free up your iPhone storage almost immediately - 8 easy ways
articles.summary: Running out of iPhone space? Don't panic-buy a new phone or more iCloud. Here's how to free up space fast.

articles.title: NVIDIA AI Releases Nemotron-Terminal: A Systematic Data Engineering Pipeline for Scaling LLM Terminal Agents
articles.summary:
The race to build autonomous AI agents has hit a massive bottleneck: data. While frontier models like Claude Code and Codex CLI have demonstrated impressive proficiency in terminal environments, the training strategies and data mixtures behind them have remained closely guarded secrets. This lack of transparency has forced researchers and devs into a costly cycle […]

articles.title: Amazon launches its healthcare AI assistant on its website and app
articles.summary: Health AI can answer questions, explain health records, manage prescription renewals, book appointments, and more.

articles.title: 【Excelで学ぶデータ分析】生成AIによって応答時間に差はあるか？［架空事例］（分散分析超入門）
articles.summary: 初歩から応用までステップアップしながら学んでいく『やさしいデータ分析』シリーズ（仮説検定編）の第14回。これまで、13回にわたって、主に2群の差や分散などについて検定の考え方やその手順を見てきました。今回は、3群以上の場合にも対応するために、分散分析の考え方や手順を解説します。

AI can drive stronger early
monetization for apps, but sustaining value remains the challenge, RevenueCat's latest report finds.

articles.title: 人体（がん治療支援）応用可能部位10か所：NRA-IDEの実装適用例（簡易小論文形式）
articles.summary:
内包性動力学--NRA-IDE（動的閾値計算)による精密がん治療支援：人体部位10選とその実装概要

著者名　M-Tokuni（私は医療関係者ではないので、あくまで机上です。)
※NRA-IDEは簡易的にいうと閾値をもつ動くものは計算可能です。逆に閾値のない動くものですが、AIいわく見つからないとか？


 要旨

NRA-IDE実装（張力、圧力、粘着力などのネットフォースをリアルタイムで計算し、閾値を超過した場合に注入位置を決定・最適化する手法）は、腫瘍微小環境（TME）のバイオメカニクス異常（IFP上昇、固形ストレス、ECM剛性変化など）を直接モニタリング・活用する汎用フレームワ...
